title: Senior SEO Specialist at HomeLane Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at HomeLane Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About HomeLane Ventures Solutions:
HomeLane Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane Ventures Solutions!
